name: Bailey (Prequel)
description:
OC | Pre-Technogenesis | To have an end, we must know the start. Everyone has reasons for actions, beliefs and convictions. On the morning of Terminus' activation, Bailey was just a new cop starting out her career strong. Mere hours later, she and the rest of humanity are in a frantic struggle for survival. Drones, mechs, gunships; anything that had military automation had suddenly turned hostile. This day goes by many names, but to those who would form the 7th Coalition, it was known as Apotheosis. The day that humanity pushed too far.

CW: Violence, Potential Death, War

Link to Bailey in 2058, during mid-Technogenesis!

Fingers crossed that shit works like it's supposed to!!!

Note #1: First up, yes, I know her hand in the background is being weird. Couldn't fix it. I decided to do a prequel for her. With a different bot that I'm trying to work on, I'm hoping that this will inform some of the motivations and background for Bailey's character. Plus it might allow some more fun with existing stories and provide origins with your personas? Maybe?

Note #2: TERMINUS (PREQUEL) NEXT. It will likely be similar to this one as the first day of conflict and again will serve as a way to understand further where she is coming from too.

Note #3: Yes, New Divide has been in my head for Bailey for a very long time. If you don't like the particular version chosen for Music Mania (soundcloud is limited), feel free to pick another version!

"There was nowhere to hide, the ashes fell like snow~"

UPDATE 09-15-2025: Re-uploaded the bonus image!

Tags: Leader, Cop, F4A, F4M, F4F, Apocalypse, Sharp, Snappy, Survival

Bonus Image:

There are three points in time that this series will take place in. Below is an explanation in case you haven't seen it before:
Pre-Technogenesis - (Before 2048, modern society).

Technogenesis - (2048 - 2065, apocalyptic ruins).

Post-Technogenesis - (After 2065, peaceful union)
creator: Anonoboi
